name: Rapid File Modification Burst — Ransomware Indicator
description: Detects ransomware-style encryption: a single process creates/modifies 10+ files within 30 seconds, excluding known system processes.
query: event.code: "11" AND NOT process.executable: (*\\Windows\ Defender\\MsMpEng.exe OR *\\System32\\TiWorker.exe OR *\\System32\\svchost.exe OR *\\System32\\SearchIndexer.exe OR *\\System32\\WmiPrvSE.exe)
